raw.objective: “To derive a model describing carbamazepine (CBZ) clearance in children, in terms of individual patient characteristics.”
raw.covariates: WT, comedication with phenobarbitone or phenytoin on CL
raw.observations: F assumed to be complete. No differences between ethnicities. The lack of predicted vs observed concentration plots do not allow us to determine the quality of the model and its predictions
raw.equations: CL/F=theta1*(WT**theta2)*(theta4**IND)+eta1 Vd/F=theta5*WT Ka=theta6 Cobs=Cipred + eps1 IND=comedication with one or more inducers (phenobarbitone or phenytoin), (Yes=1, No=0)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.70 theta2=0.40 theta4=1.43 theta5=Taken from Mackichan 1986, probably=1.5 theta6=0.34 omega1=0.0204 sigma1=0.0942

extraction_target.title: A model for the determination of carbamazepine clearance in children on mono- and polytherapy.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F=theta1*(WT**theta2)*(theta4**IND)+eta1 Vd/F=theta5*WT Ka=theta6 Cobs=Cipred + eps1 IND=comedication with one or more inducers (phenobarbitone or phenytoin), (Yes=1, No=0)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “To derive a model describing carbamazepine (CBZ) clearance in children, in terms of individual patient characteristics.”

tested: comedication with phenobarbitone or phenytoin on CL
covariates.raw: WT, comedication with phenobarbitone or phenytoin on CL

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
